violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment employees Food Safety manager, establishment must renew RI Food Safety Manager license with RIDOH OFP. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Eggs are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
Ice was observed built up in excess on the Chest Freezer refrigeration unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2026

The floor behind equipment had an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the main dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024
The floor in the kitchen has an accumulation of mice droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by mice droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the main dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer, shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

The floor in the kitchen/service-bar area has an accumulation of mice droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
The floor next to refrigerator in the back area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023
